json_data.title: Computational Models of Memory and Learning
json_data.reason: This topic delves into specific cognitive functions that are fundamental components of any cognitive architecture, like ACT-R's memory modules.

json_data.title: Neurocomputational Models of Decision Making
json_data.reason: This topic integrates cognitive modeling with neuroscience, requiring a deeper understanding of how brain mechanisms underpin complex cognitive processes often modeled by architectures.

json_data.title: Integrating Neuro-Symbolic AI with Cognitive Architectures for Explainable Reasoning
json_data.reason: This topic explores advanced research at the intersection of different AI paradigms and cognitive modeling to address the grand challenge of explainable general intelligence.
